name: World 2: Scorching Desert

criteriaResults.description: Desert tile palette is visually distinct from Forest
criteriaResults.evidence: COLORS.desert.sand === '#C4943A', darkSand === '#8B6B2E', lightStone === '#D4B896'. Renderer._getCurrentWorld() returns 1 for desert stages. _drawDesertSolidTile uses desert palette with sandy surface, bleached bone highlight, dark sand body, stone texture. Screenshots confirm golden/sand tiles clearly distinct from forest green.

criteriaResults.description: Desert parallax background with at least 3 layers
criteriaResults.evidence: After Camera.init(), Camera.layers has 4 entries: layer 0 (speed 0.05, 15 elements = distant dunes), layer 1 (speed 0.15, 60 elements = ruins/cacti), layer 2 (speed 0.3, 50 elements = near dunes), layer 3 (speed 0.5, 80 elements = foreground). Plus sky gradient and heat shimmer for 6 effective layers. _renderDesertParallax draws: sky gradient (#E8B84A->#8B6B2E), distant dune shapes, mid-distance cactus silhouettes + ruin columns, near dune curves. Screenshots confirm multi-layer desert background with dunes, cacti, and ruins visible.

criteriaResults.description: Heat shimmer visual effect in desert stages
criteriaResults.evidence: _renderHeatShimmer function exists at renderer.js. Draws 8 animated wavy lines using sine-based oscillation (this._heatShimmerTimer * 3 + x * 0.02). Timer advances correctly during render calls (verified: 0 -> 1.0 after 60 frames). White semi-transparent (alpha 0.08) horizontal shimmer bands create heat distortion effect. Subtle horizontal bands visible in desert screenshots.

criteriaResults.description: Sand Skitter enemy charges toward player
criteriaResults.evidence: 5 Sand Skitters found in stage 2-1. Properties: health=1, speed=1.2, chargeSpeed=3.0 (2.5x patrol speed), detectRange=200, behavior='charge'. _updateSandSkitter handler exists in enemies.js. chargeSpeed > speed confirmed (3.0 > 1.2). Visible in stage 2-1 screenshots as dark desert creature on platforms.

criteriaResults.description: Dust Devil enemy is invincible with sine-wave pattern
criteriaResults.evidence: 2 Dust Devils found in stage 2-1. Properties: invincible=true, health=Infinity, behavior='sine_wave', sineOffset present, baseY=384. Attack test: hpBefore=Infinity, hpAfter=Infinity, stillAlive=true. _getDefaults returns health: Infinity for dust_devil type. Cannot be killed by player attacks.

criteriaResults.description: Mummy enemy revives once after first death
criteriaResults.evidence: 3 Mummies found in stage 2-2. Properties: health=2, maxHealth=2, revived=false, canRevive=true, reviveCount=0. enemies.js handles 'reviving' state at line ~241: on death with canRevive && !revived, enters 'reviving' state with reviveTimer, then restores to 'active' with full health and revived=true. Second death stays dead since revived===true.

45 quicksand tiles (TILE_QUICKSAND=8, TILE_QUICKSAND_DEEP=9) found in stage 2-1. Quicksand tiles are also tracked in Level.quicksandTiles array (45 entries). _drawQuicksandTile renders them with desert palette. Visible as lighter sandy patches in stage 2-1 screenshots. player.js has quicksand sinking physics.

Level.isDark=true for stage 2-2. Level.darkZones has 2 zones defined. Renderer.renderDarkOverlay function implements spotlight effect: draws 0.85-opacity black overlay then cuts out radial gradient spotlight (radius 100px) centered on player using 'destination-out' compositing. drawDarkOverlay wrapper exists for compatibility.

357 water tiles (TILE_WATER=10, TILE_WATER_SURFACE=11) found in stage 2-3. Level.waterTiles array has 378 entries. _drawWaterTile renders translucent blue overlay. Screenshots of stage 2-3 'Oasis Mirage' clearly show large blue water section integrated with desert terrain. player.js has water swimming physics with reduced gravity.

1 pressure plate tile (TILE_PRESSURE_PLATE=12) found in stage 2-1. Level.pressurePlates array has 1 entry. _drawPressurePlateTile renders the plate with visual feedback. TILE_GATE=13 exists for gates triggered by plates.

Level.mirrors has 3 entries in stage 2-2. Renderer.renderMirrors function draws mirror elements with desert lightStone base and reflective surface using Canvas primitives. Mirrors have position (x,y) and orientation properties for light redirection.

Level.width=110, height=20. spawnX=64, spawnY=480 (valid spawn). exitX exists (hasExit=true). bossData={type:'sand_wyrm'}. 7 enemies spawned. Width 110 >= 100 threshold. Screenshots show sandy terrain with platforms, quicksand sections, and enemies.

Level.width=135, height=22. spawnX=64, spawnY=544. exitX exists. bossData={type:'pharaoh_specter'}. 8 enemies spawned. Width 135 >= 130 threshold. Has dark zones and mirror puzzle elements for temple aesthetics.

Level.width=145, height=22. spawnX=64, spawnY=512. exitX exists. bossData={type:'hydra_cactus'}. 8 enemies spawned. Width 145 >= 140 threshold. Screenshots show desert terrain combined with large water sections.

spawnBoss('sand_wyrm') creates boss with health=6, maxHealth=6, type='sand_wyrm', name='Sand Wyrm'. HUD.bossActive=true, HUD.bossName='Sand Wyrm'. Boss has submerged property for ground-emergence attack pattern. patterns=['emerge'].

criteriaResults.description: Pharaoh Specter boss has 8 HP with teleport/summon
criteriaResults.evidence: spawnBoss('pharaoh_specter') creates boss with health=8, maxHealth=8, type='pharaoh_specter', name='Pharaoh Specter'. patterns=['teleport','summon']. Has teleportTimer and summonTimer properties. HUD.bossName='Pharaoh Specter'.

criteriaResults.description: Hydra Cactus boss has 12 HP with 3 heads
criteriaResults.evidence: spawnBoss('hydra_cactus') creates boss with health=12, maxHealth=12, type='hydra_cactus', name='Hydra Cactus'. boss.heads array has 3 entries, each with {health:4, maxHealth:4, active:true}. headCount=3. Total HP = 3 heads x 4 HP = 12. HUD.bossName='Hydra Cactus'.

Invulnerable test: boss.vulnerable=false, attack dealt 0 damage (hpBefore===hpAfter). Vulnerable test: boss.vulnerable=true, attack dealt 1 damage (hpAfter < hpBefore). checkPlayerAttackCollisions respects vulnerable flag. Same vulnerability framework pattern from Sprint 5.

criteriaResults.description: Desert bosses have phase transitions at 50% health
criteriaResults.evidence: _updateBoss contains: 'if (b.health <= Math.floor(b.maxHealth * 0.5) && b.phase === 1) { b.phase = 2; }'. Verified: Sand Wyrm boss starts at phase=1, after setting health to 40% (2/6) and running 120 update cycles, boss.phase=2 and state='vulnerable'. Phase 2 modifies attack timing (e.g., vulnDuration changes from 80 to 55 for Sand Wyrm).

criteriaResults.description: Coins per stage match WorldMap.STAGES definitions
criteriaResults.evidence: Stage 2-1: 18 coins, 2 health pickups. Stage 2-2: 22 coins, 3 health pickups. Stage 2-3: 28 coins, 3 health pickups. All match expected totals (18, 22, 28). Each stage has >= 1 health pickup.

criteriaResults.description: Each desert stage has at least 3 enemies
criteriaResults.evidence: Stage 2-1: 7 enemies. Stage 2-2: 8 enemies. Stage 2-3: 8 enemies. All exceed minimum of 3. Enemy types include sand_skitter, dust_devil, mummy. Screenshots show enemies positioned on platforms and ground surfaces.

Stage widths: 2-1=110, 2-2=135, 2-3=145. All different from each other. None match forest widths (85, 125, 155). Each stage has distinct features: 2-1 has quicksand, 2-2 has dark zones + mirrors, 2-3 has water sections.

criteriaResults.description: Boss fights trigger correctly in desert stages
criteriaResults.evidence: Stage 2-1: bossArenaX defined, triggering spawns Sand Wyrm boss with maxHealth=6. HUD.bossActive=true, HUD.bossName='Sand Wyrm'. Camera.lockToArena function available for arena locking. Boss spawns at defined bossData.spawnX/spawnY coordinates.

GameState has STAGE_COMPLETE='STAGE_COMPLETE' state. SaveSystem exists with save/load functions. GameState has setupStageComplete method. GameState states include: TITLE, CONTROLS, WORLD_MAP, STAGE, PAUSED, GAME_OVER, STAGE_COMPLETE.

With fresh save (no completions): 3 desert nodes all unlocked=false. After completing 1-1, 1-2, 1-3: desert node 2-1 becomes unlocked=true, 2-2 and 2-3 remain locked. WorldMap.init() applies unlock state from save data. World map screenshot shows 'Dune Sea' with 'LOCKED' status when stages incomplete, and 'Complete Treetop Gauntlet to unlock' text.

1-1: width=85, 5 enemies, boss=elder_shroomba (5 HP). 1-2: width=125, 7 enemies, boss=vine_mother (6 HP). 1-3: width=155, 8 enemies, boss=stag_king (7 HP). All forest widths, enemy counts, and boss HPs preserved. Forest tiles render with green palette. Screenshot of stage 1-1 confirms forest theme intact with green canopy tiles.

Player module exists with update and takeDamage functions. COYOTE_FRAMES=6, JUMP_BUFFER_FRAMES=8, WALK_MAX_SPEED=5, RUN_MAX_SPEED=8, WALL_SLIDE_SPEED=2, ATTACK_DURATION=9, CHARGE_TIME=60. All physics constants preserved. Player moves correctly in desert stage screenshots.

GameState has all required states: TITLE, CONTROLS, WORLD_MAP, STAGE, PAUSED, GAME_OVER, STAGE_COMPLETE. Verified transitions: TITLE->WORLD_MAP (Enter key), WORLD_MAP->STAGE (select node + Enter). HUD exists with render function. Renderer exists. GameState has setupStage, setupWorldMap, setupTitle methods.

criteriaResults.description: World map navigation with desert cluster
criteriaResults.evidence: After WorldMap.init(): 13 total nodes (>= 12 minimum). 3 desert nodes (world=1). WORLD_COLORS has 5 entries. Desert color: {primary:'#C4943A', secondary:'#8B6B2E', bg:'#3A2A1A', highlight:'#E8D4A0', name:'Scorching Desert'}. World map screenshot shows 4 world clusters with labels including 'Scorching Desert'. Info panel renders stage details.

criteriaResults.description: Save system persists across World 1 and World 2
criteriaResults.evidence: SaveSystem.save and load working correctly. After saving W1 completions (1-1, 1-2, 1-3) then adding 2-1: loaded save contains completedStages=['1-1','1-2','1-3','2-1'], bestTimes with both world entries (1-1:60, 2-1:80), coinRecords with both world entries (1-1:15, 2-1:18). No data loss between worlds.

regressionResults.summary: All critical regression checks pass. Canvas 960x540, game loop running (Game._loop), Player module with all physics constants, Camera with arena locking, HUD with render, GameState with all 7 states, WorldMap with 13 nodes and STAGES array, SaveSystem with save/load, Enemies framework with spawn/spawnBoss/checkPlayerAttackCollisions, all 3 forest stages (1-1/85w, 1-2/125w, 1-3/155w) loading with correct bosses (5/6/7 HP), tile type constants 1-7 all intact.

designSpecAdherence.notes: Desert palette colors match design-spec.md exactly: sand #C4943A, darkSand #8B6B2E, lightStone #D4B896, shadow #3A2A1A, bleachedBone #E8D4A0. UI Chrome colors (Deep Charcoal, Warm Slate, Muted Gold, Soft Cream, Ember Red) used correctly in HUD and menus. Health hearts in Ember Red positioned top-left per spec. Coin counter with Muted Gold at top-center. Boss health bar with name label. Stage name in bold at top-right. Text rendered with dark outlines for readability. Canvas 960x540 with 32x32 tile grid. World map nodes with proper coloring and info panel. Menu buttons with Warm Slate background and Muted Gold borders with triangle selector. Slight deductions: enemy sprites are basic Canvas shapes rather than detailed pixel art, some visual polish opportunities remain.

screenshots: Stage 2-1 Dune Sea: Golden sand parallax background with layered dunes, cacti silhouettes, and ruin columns. Sandy ground tiles with stone texture. Platforms with desert lightStone color. Sand Skitter enemies visible on platforms.
Stage 2-3 Oasis Mirage: Desert terrain combined with large blue translucent water section. One-way stone platforms. Desert enemies. Water section clearly visible with modified physics area.
Stage 1-1 Canopy Trail (regression): Green forest theme intact with canopy tiles, bark platforms, Shroomba enemies. Parallax mountain/tree layers. No cross-contamination from desert additions.
World Map: 4 world clusters visible with labels (Whispering Forest, Scorching Desert, Frozen Tundra, Molten Volcano). Info panel shows stage details. Desert cluster uses sand color palette.

notes: All 30 criteria pass. Sprint 6 delivers a complete World 2: Scorching Desert with 3 stages (110/135/145 tiles), 3 enemy types (Sand Skitter charge, Dust Devil invincible sine-wave, Mummy revive), 3 bosses (Sand Wyrm 6HP emerge, Pharaoh Specter 8HP teleport/summon, Hydra Cactus 12HP 3-heads), and 5 new mechanics (quicksand sinking, dark room spotlight, water/swimming, pressure plates, mirror puzzles). Desert theme is visually distinct with proper palette, 4-layer parallax, and heat shimmer. All forest content preserved intact. World map progression correctly locks desert stages until World 1 completion. Save system handles cross-world data without loss.
